scene1_hook: Brad picks up on the second ring. He always picks up on the second ring. The voice on the other end says — Brad, I need you to talk me down. Something happened today. Brad does not flinch. He has heard this before. He says — okay. Tell me what you saw. The voice says — they showed me a thing. It wrote a forty-page report. In six minutes. I have been doing this for twenty-two years, Brad. Twenty-two years. Brad says — are you sitting down. The voice says — no. Brad says — sit down.
keywords_scene1: phone call urgent businessman office dramatic
man sitting down breathing taking a breath

scene1_overlays.head: Brad. I need you to talk me down.
It wrote a 40-page report. Six minutes.
scene1_overlays.sub: I've been doing this 22 years, Brad.

scene2_problem: Brad says — how many tabs do you have open right now. The voice says — I do not know. A lot. Brad says — close all of them except one. The voice says — which one. Brad says — it does not matter which one. Just one. The voice is quiet for a second. Then says — okay. Brad says — good. Now breathe. The voice says — I am breathing. Brad says — slower.
keywords_scene2: laptop screen overwhelmed browser tabs too many
person stressed computer screen scrolling panic
breathing calm slowing down taking a moment

scene2_overlays.head: Close all of them except one.
scene2_overlays.sub: Which one? It does not matter. Just one.

scene3_stakes: The voice comes back and says — Brad, what if everything I know is wrong. Brad says — it is not everything. The voice says — most of it. Brad says — probably not most of it either. The voice says — it feels like most of it. Brad says — I know. That feeling is real. The math is real. But you are not behind. You are just early enough to feel it before everyone else does. The voice says — is that good. Brad says — it is very good. Depending on what you do next.
keywords_scene3: businessman deep thought reflection window office
early mover advantage timing business opportunity

scene3_overlays.head: It is not everything. — It feels like most of it.
scene3_overlays.sub: That feeling is real. The math is real.

scene3_overlays.head: You are just early enough to feel it
Is that good?
scene3_overlays.sub: It is very good. Depending on what you do next.

scene4_solution: Brad says — here is what I need you to do. Not all of it. Just one thing. Pick one thing you do every single week and find out if there is a faster way to do it now. That is it. The voice says — one thing. Brad says — one thing. The voice says — and then what. Brad says — then you call me back and tell me how it went. The voice says — what if it does not work. Brad says — then we try a different thing. But it will probably work. The voice says — how do you know. Brad says — because they all work. I just need you to pick one.
keywords_scene4: mentor coaching conversation phone call calm advice
businessman nodding understanding light bulb moment
one step action laptop working determined focus

scene4_overlays.head: One thing you do every week.
scene4_overlays.sub: Find out if there is a faster way now.

scene4_overlays.head: What if it does not work? — Try a different thing.
scene4_overlays.sub: They all work. I just need you to pick one.

scene5_ask: The voice on the other end goes quiet. Then says — okay. Brad. I think I am okay. Brad says — I know you are. The voice says — do you do this all day. Brad says — not all day. The voice says — how many calls like this do you get. Brad says — enough. The voice says — Brad. Thank you. Brad says — call me when you pick your one thing. Do not call me when you open a new tab. The voice says — deal. Brad hangs up. He picks up on the next call. Second ring.
keywords_scene5: phone call ending satisfied resolution calm
businessman smiling relieved confident after call
person hanging up phone walking away calm determined
tagline: You don't need Brad. You just need to pick one thing.

lines: He is very good at his job
He did not ask to be in this video
Do not call Brad when you open a new tab
He picks up on the second ring
